title: Add SEO meta tags to all pages

requirements.summary: Update index.html with comprehensive SEO meta tags including title, description, keywords, Open Graph, and Twitter Card tags for discoverability and rich social previews
acceptanceCriteria: index.html contains a <title> tag with 'Coal & Curry | Authentic Chettinad Restaurant'
index.html contains a <meta name='description'> tag with a concise restaurant description
index.html contains <meta name='keywords'> with relevant terms (Chettinad, biryani, restaurant, etc.)
index.html contains Open Graph tags: og:title, og:description, og:type, og:url, og:image
index.html contains Twitter Card tags: twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description

file_operations.description: Add SEO meta tags to the <head> section: update <title> to 'Coal & Curry | Authentic Chettinad Restaurant', add <meta name='description'> with restaurant summary, add <meta name='keywords'> with terms like 'Chettinad restaurant, coal-grilled cuisine, authentic South Indian, biryani, dosa, tandoori', add Open Graph tags (og:title, og:description, og:type='restaurant', og:url='https://coalandcurry.com', og:image pointing to frontend/public/assets/generated/coal-curry-logo-horizontal.dim_800x300.png), and add Twitter Card tags (twitter:card='summary_large_image', twitter:title, twitter:description, twitter:image). Use the generated logo image as the social share preview image.

requirements.summary: Ensure every public page renders the SEOHead component with unique, page-specific title, description, canonical URL, Open Graph, and Twitter Card values
acceptanceCriteria: Every public page (Home, About, Menu, Offers, Gallery, Blog, Contact, Reservation, Loyalty) renders an <SEOHead> component with a unique title and description
Each page's title follows the pattern '[Page Name] | Coal & Curry'
Each page's meta description is unique and accurately describes that page's content
Canonical URLs are set per page using the coalandcurry.com domain
Open Graph and Twitter Card tags are populated on every page

file_operations.description: Add or update the <SEOHead> component call with title='Coal & Curry | Authentic Chettinad Restaurant', description='Experience authentic Chettinad cuisine with traditional coal-grilled specialties, biryanis, and South Indian classics in a warm, inviting atmosphere', canonical='https://coalandcurry.com/', and ogImage pointing to frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-coal-curry.dim_1920x1080.png. Ensure Twitter Card tags are included.

Add or update the <SEOHead> component call with title='About Us | Coal & Curry', description='Learn about Coal & Curry's journey, our passionate chefs, and our commitment to authentic Chettinad flavors and hygiene standards', canonical='https://coalandcurry.com/about', and ogImage pointing to frontend/public/assets/generated/founder-portrait.dim_600x600.png.

Add or update the <SEOHead> component call with title='Menu | Coal & Curry', description='Browse our extensive menu featuring coal-grilled specials, biryanis, dosas, Chettinad curries, and refreshing beverages', canonical='https://coalandcurry.com/menu', and ogImage pointing to frontend/public/assets/generated/dish-chettinad-biryani.dim_800x600.png.

Add or update the <SEOHead> component call with title='Special Offers | Coal & Curry', description='Save on your favorites with our limited-time offers including Lunch Combos, Family Feasts, and Weekend Grill specials', canonical='https://coalandcurry.com/offers', and ogImage pointing to frontend/public/assets/generated/offers-banner-bg.dim_1920x600.png.

Add or update the <SEOHead> component call with title='Gallery | Coal & Curry', description='Explore our restaurant ambience, charcoal cooking techniques, signature dishes, and celebration moments captured in photos', canonical='https://coalandcurry.com/gallery', and ogImage pointing to frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-charcoal-cooking.dim_1200x800.png.

Add or update the <SEOHead> component call with title='Blog | Coal & Curry', description='Discover stories about Chettinad cuisine, cooking tips, cultural traditions, and culinary insights from our kitchen', canonical='https://coalandcurry.com/blog', and ogImage pointing to frontend/public/assets/generated/chettinad-chicken.dim_600x400.png.

Add or update the <SEOHead> component call with title='Contact Us | Coal & Curry', description='Get in touch with Coal & Curry. Find our location, hours, phone number, and reach out via our contact form', canonical='https://coalandcurry.com/contact', and ogImage pointing to frontend/public/assets/generated/restaurant-interior.dim_1200x800.png.

Add or update the <SEOHead> component call with title='Reservations | Coal & Curry', description='Reserve your table at Coal & Curry. Select your date, time, party size, and seating preferences for a memorable dining experience', canonical='https://coalandcurry.com/reservation', and ogImage pointing to frontend/public/assets/generated/ambience-dining.dim_1200x800.png.

Add or update the <SEOHead> component call with title='Loyalty Program | Coal & Curry', description='Join the Coal & Curry rewards program and earn points with every visit. Unlock exclusive perks from Coal to Inferno tier', canonical='https://coalandcurry.com/loyalty', and ogImage pointing to frontend/public/assets/generated/coal-curry-logo-circular.dim_512x512.png.

requirements.summary: Verify and update robots.txt and sitemap.xml to ensure all public pages are crawlable with accurate URLs, priorities, and current lastmod dates
acceptanceCriteria: robots.txt references the correct sitemap URL
sitemap.xml lists all 9 public pages with valid canonical URLs
No public pages are accidentally blocked in robots.txt

file_operations.description: Verify that robots.txt allows crawling of all public paths (/, /about, /menu, /offers, /gallery, /blog, /contact, /reservation, /loyalty), disallows /cart and /checkout, and correctly references the sitemap at https://coalandcurry.com/sitemap.xml. Update if needed to ensure alignment with current site structure.

Verify that sitemap.xml includes all 9 public pages with canonical URLs (https://coalandcurry.com/, /about, /menu, /offers, /gallery, /blog, /contact, /reservation, /loyalty). Update lastmod dates to the current date (or a recent date reflecting the SEO update). Ensure priority values are set appropriately (e.g., homepage at 1.0, key pages like menu/reservation at 0.8-0.9, others at 0.7). Confirm changefreq values reflect realistic update patterns (homepage: daily, content pages: weekly/monthly).
